use std::collections::VecDeque;

struct TaskQueue {
    items: VecDeque<Task>,
}

impl TaskQueue {
    fn new() -> Self {
        Self { items: VecDeque::new() }
    }

    fn enqueue(&mut self, task: Task) {
        self.items.push_back(task);
    }

    fn dequeue(&mut self) -> Option<Task> {
        // GOOD: VecDeque::pop_front is O(1)
        self.items.pop_front()
    }
}

struct Task {
    id: u64,
    payload: Vec<u8>,
}
